name: Hunsekjuttsuppe-Chicken Soup with Apples and Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 leek, white portion only, cleaned and thinly sliced
2-inch piece of parsnip, peeled and finely diced
2 medium Granny Smith or other tart apples, peeled, quartered, and cut into 1/2 inch vertical slices
Salt and white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the broth to a simmer.
2. Melt butter in a saucepan and slowly sauté leek, carrot, and parsnip for about 7 minutes or until they begin to soften without taking on color.
3. Stir in flour and cook for 5 minutes, stirring until well blended.
4. Pour the mixture into hot broth, stirring vigorously.
5. Simmer gently for about 10 minutes or until the soup is smooth and slightly thick.
6. Add apple slices and chicken, and simmer for another 10 minutes or until apples and vegetables are tender but still slightly firm.
7. Adjust seasonings with salt and pepper.
